prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部隶属于北京大学，985/211/双一流，软科主榜北京大学稳居前2名，学校层次为国内顶尖；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、食堂宿舍等舆情；但抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度仍处高位；历史投档异常信号不明显；临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A，医学学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业持续高热；江苏省2026年考生总数约52.1万，较2025年约35.8万大幅增长约45.5%，物理类考生估算约38万，竞争显著加剧；省控线（物理类本科批）从2021年417分逐年升至2025年463分，整体考生水平提高；北京大学医学部位于北京，在江苏属跨省招生，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1039名、2026年扩招14.3%（缓解竞争）、江苏省考生总数大幅增长约45.5%（加剧竞争）、医学类专业持续高热、学校声誉偏负面但抖音热度极高，竞争加剧效应远大于扩招缓解效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年略有前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约1078名，区间955–1201名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 448 → 272 → 375 → 483 → 1039, showing a clear backward trend in recent years, with a shift of 556 places backward in 2025 compared to 2024, and a baseline ranking of about 1039; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 17 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 18 in 2024, and to 21 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24, an increase of 3 (14.3%) over 2025, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211/Double First-Class university, with Peking University consistently ranking in the top 2 on the Soft Science main list, making it a top-tier domestic institution; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus safety, cafeteria, dormitory, and other public opinion; however, Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, and application attention remains high; no obvious abnormal signals in historical admission; Clinical Medicine A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Nursing A+, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A, with medical disciplines at the national top level, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be highly popular; the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.5% compared to about 358,000 in 2025, with an estimated 380,000 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has risen from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, indicating an overall improvement in candidate level; Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, with cross-provincial enrollment in Jiangsu and no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1039, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 14.3% (alleviating competition), the significant increase of about 45.5% in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province (intensifying competition), the continued high popularity of medical majors, the somewhat negative university reputation but extremely high Douyin popularity, the competition intensification effect far outweighs the enrollment expansion alleviation effect, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1078, with a range of 955–1201.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Doctor Combined Program)
- Stomatology (Bachelor-Doctor Combined Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Basic Medicine (Bachelor-Doctor Combined Program)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Pharmacy (Bachelor-Master Combined Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Preventive Medicine (Bachelor-Master Combined Program)
- English (Medical English).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 955–1201, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical/Stomatology Bachelor-Doctor Combined Programs) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 955), you can focus on reaching for the top Tier 1 flagship majors.
